news-global-econ.title: Rand Paul: '50-50' Chance of a 2028 Presidential Run
news-global-econ.description:
During an appearance on this week's broadcast of "CBS Sunday Morning," Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY) put the odds of him running for president at 50% in 2028.
The post Rand Paul: ’50-50′ Chance of a 2028 Presidential Run appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: Starmer on Iran: 'Not Our War and We're Not Going to Get Dragged In'
news-global-econ.description:
The UK will not come to the aid of its allies in Iran, no matter who asks, PM Starmer said at a local election event.
The post Starmer on Iran: ‘Not Our War and We’re Not Going to Get Dragged In’ appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: U.S. Stocks Advance and Oil Pushes Higher
news-global-econ.description: U.S. stocks opened sharply higher after the Dow industrials and Nasdaq composite fell into correction territory last week.

news-global-econ.title: Gavin Newsom bashes Elon Musk as ‘one of the great disappointments'
news-global-econ.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom told Axios that Elon Musk has “put the brakes" on EV innovation and warned China is overtaking the United States in the electric vehicle market.

news-korea-soc.title: Iran's war against the US and Israel is being fueled by North Korean weapons, expert warns
news-korea-soc.description: Iran's ballistic missiles, including the Shahab-3 and Khorramshahr-4, were developed with North Korean help, says expert Bruce Bechtol, who urges stronger sanctions enforcement.

news-korea-soc.title: AI war in Iran has brought conflict to Silicon Valley. No one is ready
news-korea-soc.description: Iran published a 29-location target list naming Amazon, Microsoft, Google, Nvidia and Palantir, then struck AWS data centers in the UAE and Bahrain.
